statement.headerDoc:
STEP 990 — Brocard's problem n ∈ [21, 50] Lean 4 extension
  ============================================================

  Follow-up to STEP 980 (n ∈ [13, 20]). Using Nat.sqrt-based O(log)
  approach established in Step980BrocardExtended.lean.

  Target: n ∈ [21, 50] non-square verification (30 new theorems).
  Combined with STEP 980 and BrocardProblem.lean (n ≤ 12):
    Rei-AIOS Brocard coverage n ∈ [1, 50] (52 theorems total).

  Honest positioning:
    - Berndt-Galway 2000 extended to N ≤ 10⁹ (1,000,000× beyond our n≤50 range).
    - Rei's contribution: Lean 4 mechanical verification for

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
